chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2807 of 2015 CP D 2955 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 08.04.2025 Jam Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Naeemullah Bhutto, advocate for respondent-TMC Ibrahim Hyderi Mr. Abdul Ahad Shaikh, Law Officer, TMC Ibrahim Hyderi Amended title filed, taken on record. Office is directed to place it at the appropriate place. Learned A.A.G. and Mr. Abdul Ahad Shaikh, Law Officer, TMC Ibrahim Hyderi, states under instructions that the impugned notices and challans subject matter herein are being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the respondent to initiate proceedings / issue notice as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
